$description: Per-screen handoff spec for "Visitor log" (S7) in flow "xplor-hub-login". Generated by scripts/build-handoff.mjs — do not edit by hand.
name: Visitor log
purpose: Log of today's visitors: sign a new visitor in, or sign an existing one out.
entry: From the Dashboard (Visitor log) — no login required
exit: → S8 via the Sign in card; back → S1
layout: Hub shell with back-link 'Dashboard'; title 'Visitor Log'
Full-width action card: Sign in — New visitor (solid teal tile)
Section label 'Afternoon' over a stacked list of visitor rows (initials tile, name, 'Signed in {time}', Sign out link)

redlines.spec: 16px between rows; 28px below the Sign in card

behaviour: Sign out removes the visitor's row immediately and shows the toast '{name} signed out'.
The Sign in card opens the New Visitor form (S8).
Signing out every visitor leaves the 'Afternoon' section empty — no designed empty state (see open questions). The list resets when a journey relaunches.
a11y: Each Sign out needs a distinct accessible name ('Sign out William Walker').
Row removal + toast must be announced (aria-live=polite).

acceptance.text: Sign out removes the row and confirms with a toast.
acceptance.assert: click('Sign out' on row) -> row removed AND toast '{name} signed out' visible

acceptance.text: The Sign in card opens the New Visitor form.
